root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.eng_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD')||' '||pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((((to_char( current_date , 'mm'))::numeric))::int, 'LE' )||' '||to_char(current_date,'yyyy') as sysdate_tdate , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, ( case '!name_1!' when '1' then 'LADDAWAN BORDEERAT' end )|| ( case '!assis_1!' when '1' then 'MRS. CHUTIMA PUMBUPA' end )|| ( case '!kirana_1!' when '1' then 'Mr. REUNGDECH PAIRBUMRUNG' end )||( case '!rutta_1!' when '1' then 'MRS.RAVEEWAN CHODOK' end ) as name, ( case '!name_1!' when '1' then 'MANAGER' else 'ASSISTANT MANAGER' end ) as position, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '030739' )

r_ktm_member_book_assure_eng_sutip_nest.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_acc_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance FROM sc_dep_m_creditor WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 ) order by sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no

r_ktm_member_book_assure_eng_sutip_nest_.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 )
